quick-perf-hibernate-junit5/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
quick-perf-hibernate-junit5/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize or comply with Java 21 requirements.

quick-perf-hibernate-junit5/src/main/jav.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
quick-perf-hibernate-junit5/src/main/jav.why_exists: javax.persistence classes are no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x / Jakarta EE 9+, causing compilation errors due to missing imports.

quick-perf-hibernate-junit5/src/main/jav.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
quick-perf-hibernate-junit5/src/main/jav.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on Java 21 with modern frameworks.

quick-perf-hibernate-junit5/src/main/jav.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
quick-perf-hibernate-junit5/src/main/jav.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed from the Java SE module system and is not available in Jakarta EE 9+ compliant containers (like Spring Boot 3.x running on Java 21), causing a ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

quick-perf-hibernate-junit5/src/test/jav.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
quick-perf-hibernate-junit5/src/test/jav.why_exists: javax.persistence classes are no longer available on the classpath in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; using them causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime, and potentially compile errors if the old API is not on the classpath.

quick-perf-hibernate-junit5/src/test/jav.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
quick-perf-hibernate-junit5/src/test/jav.why_exists: javax.persistence classes are removed from the classpath in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; using them causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime, or compile errors if the javax.persistence artifact is not present.
